q={"\048\066\099\066\086\105\114\112\069\090\074\105\098\076\097\061";"\067\105\048\113\066\078\089\097\069\053\101\061","\114\099\061\061","\057\079\089\084\078\101\061\061";"\078\090\057\073\073\112\108\047","\087\067\098\050\112\052\077\072\070\099\057\119","\076\078\072\116","\053\085\070\082\047\106\077\103\068\075\075\073\047\099\061\061";"\087\048\070\110","\055\114\108\084";"\066\118\061\061";"\109\097\110\117\107\121\086\084\067\043\074\075\101\087\070\106";"\114\110\119\086\047\057\048\101\120\057\055\053\051\051\086\071\097\075\061\061","\116\050\082\051","\085\050\055\109\077\085\116\072\056\052\090\082\078\052\051\061","\090\055\119\079";"\068\054\053\056";"\066\074\112\115";"\111\065\080\098\085\077\055\052\088\056\047\065\082\074\105\082\066\120\080\108\081\053\043\104\122\122\073\051\074\101\061\061";"\053\051\107\100\121\087\104\097\097\102\090\116\077\043\112\081\056\051\097\061";"\076\075\073\101\078\076\057\084\122\080\109\106\057\065\070\068\082\102\104\108";"\068\069\076\087";"\070\119\118\116";"\101\097\052\080\077\071\118\078","\089\085\085\049","\097\098\112\108\119\108\043\118\111\075\087\050","\104\100\065\068\075\086\103\115\051\067\106\070\102\118\071\061","\099\081\057\065\043\104\110\118\114\104\099\061","\077\085\086\113\078\098\108\061","\053\115\117\106\053\056\052\102\055\121\122\087\083\121\051\066\101\099\061\061";"\085\069\048\118\110\075\061\061","\072\067\083\069\053\052\075\099\089\100\111\076","\099\073\117\049\078\106\051\061";"\047\073\072\072\121\118\061\061","\067\080\104\108\074\101\061\061","\078\073\043\103\072\118\061\061";"\097\055\089\051\121\048\047\109\122\068\048\061","\066\082\118\081\077\105\076\119\066\118\061\061","\102\112\080\070","\074\075\074\102\081\105\056\112\057\080\099\061";"\056\051\106\082\055\078\121\109\071\072\088\061","\121\073\081\100\078\067\112\049\077\073\074\119\078\085\067\043\097\118\061\061","\071\098\051\065\117\110\108\090\043\069\105\109\082\105\048\078\073\116\076\048\071\101\061\0
